title: DIE- the debut album by Ganon and Gwonam
description:
Download info here http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s37AVHsFRf4

Ganon and Gwonam have finally released their highly anticipated debut album DIE, which features the following hits:
1- The Legend of DIE
2- Game Over- DIE
3- DIE Saria DIE
4- Cantina Band Will DIE
5- Gonna DIE Now
6- We Wish You a Merry DIE
7- Aud Lang DIE

Oh and, er... this is probably my last video this year so... happy christmas everybody!
